name: think
description: Reason about a problem through a named reasoning lens that forces a structured analysis the default 'think harder' won't produce. Two lenses — the two ways to take a problem apart: first-principles (decompose DOWN — strip to irreducible axioms, rebuild from them, surface where that diverges from convention) and orthogonal (decompose SIDEWAYS — factor a tangled phenomenon into mutually-independent axes, verify the independence, name what was conflated). Each reasons in-chat (no file artifact) and feeds one-way into shape (an insight → a thought / mockup / plan). Standalone — no nav/shape dependency.
